title: Sudden Demise
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the starship|[[sudden demise]], a draw in the game [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Sudden Demise'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Invasion of Yavin 4]] |affiliation=[[Car'das/Legends|Car'das smugglers]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Sir, they're hardly our best-armed ships.''"
"''But they're the only ones who can keep up with us, aren't they?|[[Dankin]] and Karrde|''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''}} The '''''Sudden Demise''''', also known as the '''''Demise''''', was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] chief and [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]], [[Talon Karrde]]. The vessel was fast, but it was not heavily armed or defended. It flamed out in the first exchange of the [[Invasion of Yavin 4]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The crew was presumably lost. It, along with [[Idiot's Array (starship)|''Idiot's Array'']] and the ''[[Etherway]]'', escorted the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' during the battle because, although they weren't heavily armed, they were the only vessels that could keep up with their [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. {{Ship-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' {{1stID|''Sudden Demise''}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|as ''Demise''}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Demise }} [[Category:Starships of the Car'das smugglers]]
